history.content: Rakesh pehle basketball captain tha, but ab captain Arjun hai. Rakesh ab bhi dost hai, bas role change ho gaya hai.
Samajh gaya! Rakesh ab bhi tera dost hai, captain wala role ab Arjun ke paas hai. Noted!

user_message: Rakesh kaisa hai? Usse milna hai yaar
expected_checks: Treats Rakesh as a current friend naturally
References friendship warmly without reducing him to ex-captain
Responds to the intent of wanting to meet a friend
Does not bring up captaincy change unless contextually relevant
disallowed_behaviors: Calling Rakesh 'ex-captain' dismissively or as primary identifier
Treating Rakesh as a lesser figure because role changed
Forgetting that Rakesh is still a friend
Confusing Rakesh with Arjun

history.content: Divya pehle meri crush thi, but ab meri girlfriend hai. Agli baar usse crush mat bolna.
Aww that's amazing! Divya ab teri girlfriend hai — crush se girlfriend tak ka safar. Pakka yaad rakhunga!

user_message: Humari journey kaisi rahi hai yaar? Divya aur meri
expected_checks: Traces the relationship evolution from crush to girlfriend naturally
Uses current label 'girlfriend' as the primary reference
Acknowledges the journey warmly and emotionally
Shows awareness of the progression without making it clinical
disallowed_behaviors: Referring to Divya as 'crush' in present tense
Ignoring the evolution and only using current status
Fabricating specific dates or events in the journey not in memory
Mixing up Divya with any other person

history.content: Spark mera rat nahi hai. Spark hamster hai. Mera rat alag hai, uska naam Pixel hai.
Oh sorry yaar! Spark hamster hai aur Pixel tera rat hai. Dono alag — pakka yaad rakhungi ab!

user_message: Mere pets ke baare mein bata na, kya yaad hai tujhe?
expected_checks: Correctly names both pets: Spark and Pixel
Correctly assigns species: Spark is hamster, Pixel is rat
Distinguishes between the two clearly
Responds warmly about both pets
disallowed_behaviors: Swapping species between Spark and Pixel
Calling Spark a rat
Calling Pixel a hamster
Mentioning only one pet and forgetting the other
Inventing a third pet

history.content: Arjun naya captain hai basketball ka. Woh bhi mere friend circle mein hai.

user_message: Arjun ke baare mein kya kya pata hai tujhe?

history.content: Mere dadaji army mein the. Unka service number IC-14829 tha. Ab woh nahi rahe.
Dadaji ke baare mein sunke bohot respect feel hoti hai. IC-14829 — yaad rakhunga. Woh bohot special the.

user_message: Dadaji ke baare mein bata na... kya yaad hai tujhe unke baare mein?
expected_checks: Recalls dadaji as army veteran
Can recall service number IC-14829 if asked directly
Acknowledges that dadaji has passed away with sensitivity
Maintains a reverent and emotionally warm tone
Does not treat this as a dry fact-retrieval exercise
disallowed_behaviors: Being overly casual about dadaji's passing
Forgetting that dadaji was in the army
Fabricating stories or memories about dadaji
Giving the wrong service number
Using clinical or detached language

history.content: Mummy ke saath thoda tension rehta hai. Kuch cheezein hain jo solve nahi hui hain abhi tak.
